sentences.arabic: نَسْجُ السِّجَادِ حِرْفَةٌ تَقْلِيدِيَّةٌ قَدِيمَةٌ تَنْتَشِرُ فِي بِلَادِ الشَّامِ وَالْمَغْرِبِ وَإِيرَانَ.
sentences.translation: Tkanje tepiha stara je tradicionalna vještina rasprostranjena u Levantu, Magrebu i Iranu.
sentences.translationEn: Carpet weaving is an ancient traditional craft found across the Levant, the Maghreb, and Iran.

sentences.arabic: تَجْلِسُ الْمَرْأَةُ أَمَامَ النَّوْلِ وَتَنْسُجُ الْخُيُوطَ الْمُلَوَّنَةَ بِصَبْرٍ وَمَهَارَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Žena sjedi pred razbojom i strpljivo i vješto tka šarene niti.
sentences.translationEn: A woman sits at the loom and patiently and skilfully weaves coloured threads.

sentences.arabic: يَحْتَاجُ نَسْجُ سِجَّادَةٍ وَاحِدَةٍ إِلَى أَشْهُرٍ طَوِيلَةٍ مِنَ الْعَمَلِ الدَّقِيقِ.
sentences.translation: Tkanje jednog tepiha zahtijeva duge mjesece preciznog rada.
sentences.translationEn: Weaving a single carpet requires many months of precise work.

sentences.arabic: تُبَاعُ هَذِهِ السِّجَادُ بِأَثْمَانٍ عَالِيَةٍ لِأَنَّهَا قِطَعٌ فَنِّيَّةٌ حَقِيقِيَّةٌ.
sentences.translation: Ovi tepisi se prodaju po visokim cijenama jer su prave umjetnine.
sentences.translationEn: These carpets are sold at high prices because they are genuine works of art.
